title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXVI. Natural History.
content:
Hussy, hussy, where's your horse?
        Hussy, hussy, gone to grass!
        Hussy, hussy, fetch him home,
        Hussy, hussy, let him alone.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXVI. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
